_comment: Dragon Shrine reveal — camera path RECORDED IN-WORLD (/cutscene record, promoted 2026-07-23, replaces the offline-estimated path). Pans east across the shrine and settles looking EAST (+X, yaw ~-90) toward the guardian ground. Cues (title + 'prove yourself') re-timed to the 72-tick recorded duration; nudge ticks for pacing. Trigger from the shrine begin-trial with 'cutscene play dragon_shrine_reveal'.

cues.subtitle: §7Prove yourself worthy of the guardian within.
